html:
Exclusive to:

The Cave Fumarole Turf is a Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be found in the Fumarole Biome.

On the Cave Fumarole Turf, most plants cannot be planted, except for Boulderbough Seed and Surprising Seed. It is preferred turf for Sproutrock to grow.

Trivia

  • The Cave Fumarole Turf was introduced in the Ancient Echoes update.

Gallery

  • Fumarole Biome Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.
TurfsCraftable Items

On the Cave Fumarole Turf, most plants cannot be planted, except for Boulderbough Seed and Surprising Seed. It is preferred turf for Sproutrock to grow.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đất Fumarole Hang Động là một Vật Phẩm Đất chỉ có trong Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được tìm thấy trong Quần xã Fumarole.

The '''Cave Fumarole Turf''' is a [[Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be found in the [[Fumarole Biome]]. 

On the Cave Fumarole Turf, most plants cannot be planted, except for [[Boulderbough Seed]] and [[Surprising Seed]]. It is preferred turf for [[Sproutrock]] to grow.
